$comment: CI provider OIDC allowlist for cosign keyless signing against Sigstore production Fulcio. See SPEC.md §6. Every active issuer MUST be on Fulcio's public OIDC allowlist (https://github.com/sigstore/fulcio/tree/main/config). Updates are public PRs with a 14-day comment window. Removals are immediate.
inclusion_criteria: Issuer is on Sigstore production Fulcio's public OIDC allowlist.

Issuer's identity claims include enough subject metadata to bind an attestation to a specific repo + workflow + commit (so the verify endpoint can cross-check against the predicate's claimed repo URL).
Issuer is operated by an entity with a published security disclosure process.

providers.name: GitHub Actions
providers.notes: Day-1 target. Cross-checks: subject claim's repo MUST equal predicate.repo_url.

providers.name: GitLab CI (gitlab.com)
providers.notes: Day-1 target. Self-hosted GitLab instances are NOT covered by this entry; each self-hosted instance would require its own allowlist entry once Fulcio trusts it.

providers.name: Buildkite
providers.notes: Phase 1 candidate. Issuer URL to be verified against Fulcio's live config before activation.

providers.name: Google Cloud Build
providers.notes: Phase 1 candidate. Issuer URL to be verified before activation.

providers.name: AWS CodeBuild
providers.notes: Phase 1 candidate. Issuer URL to be verified before activation.

providers.name: Azure Pipelines
providers.notes: Phase 1 candidate. Issuer URL to be verified before activation.

providers.name: Codefresh
providers.notes: Phase 1 candidate. Issuer URL to be verified before activation.

deferred.name: Codeberg / Forgejo
deferred.reason: Forgejo has not yet shipped Fulcio-trusted OIDC as of the spec date. Reconsider when the upstream feature lands.
